allow: PowerShell($urls = @\('http://localhost:5213/companies/create','http://localhost:5213/events/create','http://localhost:5213/trade-blocs/create','http://localhost:5213/country-details/create','http://localhost:5213/country-advantages/create','http://localhost:5213/country-challenges/create','http://localhost:5213/gdp-snapshots/create','http://localhost:5213/revenue-sources/create','http://localhost:5213/cost-sources/create','http://localhost:5213/events/feed','http://localhost:5213/events/search?term=','http://localhost:5213/trade-blocs/search?term=eu'\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "$\($r.StatusCode\) $u" } catch { "ERR $u $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5099/events/create' -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\); EndDate dategte attr: $\($r.Content -match 'data-val-dategte-other=\\"Date\\"'\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
